production_note: 序幕以现代环境音、低频空响和灯灭瞬间为主，避免写成完整旋律；补齐基础脚步、调查和钢笔触发音，服务“灯未亮起”的现代悬疑闭环。

cues.mood: 熟悉的现代街区正在变得不安，日常城市声只剩低频残响
cues.instrumentation_prompt: modern city night ambience, low distant traffic, vending machine hum, thin wind through old apartment blocks, restrained suspense, no melody, no pop beat

cues.mood: 楼道空响，声控灯没有亮，黑暗像故意留下的位置
cues.instrumentation_prompt: empty apartment stairwell ambience, hollow hallway reverb, muted cough impulse with no light response, low electrical absence, paper-dry silence, no rhythm

cues.mood: 血滴落在信纸上，英文被墨迹吞掉，灯灭
cues.instrumentation_prompt: single dramatic stinger, paper rustle, ink spreading, tiny blood drop impact, sudden blackout, no orchestral swell, restrained RPG horror accent

event_sounds.mood: 现代居民楼外的夜路脚步，风、自动售货机和远处车流低频
event_sounds.instrumentation_prompt: game sound effect, single modern street footstep on pavement at night, distant vending machine hum, thin wind, restrained, no rhythm, clean one-shot

event_sounds.mood: 楼道、家门口、客厅、书房和卧室里的短脚步，空、近、没有回应
event_sounds.instrumentation_prompt: game sound effect, single quiet indoor footstep in apartment stairwell and dark home, hollow hallway reverb, no response, restrained, no rhythm, clean one-shot

event_sounds.mood: 调查窗户、声控灯、门锁、冷饭、照片、眼镜和手机信号时的现代物件确认音
event_sounds.instrumentation_prompt: game sound effect, inspect modern household object under silence, paper edge, phone static, key lock click, cold room air, restrained confirmation, no bell, clean one-shot

event_sounds.mood: 卧室里调查信纸和黑色钢笔，纸页、墨味和灯灭前的压力
event_sounds.instrumentation_prompt: game sound effect, inspect letter and black fountain pen in dark bedroom, paper rustle, faint ink smell, tiny static before blackout, restrained, no melody, clean one-shot

event_sounds.mood: 血滴在信纸上，英文被墨迹吞掉，灯灭并进入墨颀
event_sounds.instrumentation_prompt: game sound effect, blood drop on letter, ink spreads over English text, sudden light blackout, transition pressure, restrained RPG stinger, no orchestral swell, clean one-shot
